title: Cobblemon Steam Rising
description: A Pokemon adventure with the starts of a amazing industrial revolution.
body:
Welcome to the world of Cobblemon, I am Professor Pine and come join me in a new age of advancement. Industry has entered a golden age and pokeballs are all the more common, we now have the unique opportunity to catch and gather pokemon at a outstanding rate. So with the blueprints for machines under your belt and the pokemon I will give you this new world is in your grasps trainers. Go out! Build machines! Finally start gathering new information on all sorts of pokemon for me. This world is in a whole new time of discovery but one of great danger as well. Who knows what you young trainer's will discover! Will you find pokemon never before seen or could you create technology only thought of being fantasy a couple of decades ago!  I'm rabbling on I see, so I will be sending your to the wild with your new companion. I trust you will do well, if you run into any serious trouble's don't forget to send me a mail, hopefully you manage to find a somewhat competent pidove...

All that aside this is a pack I created to scratch a itch I didn't realize I had until recently. I remember in the old days of pixelmon just hammering away pokeballs on a small server and setting up a shop to sell them to other players. Thanks to the amazing creators of both cobblemon and create I can finally fully retire my anvil and watch pokeballs fly out and go and catch pokemon to my hearts content. I really don't know the limits of this mod and the creator's of both cobblemon and create will be going to I hope you download this pack and enjoy it with me. 

I will be attempting to make a personal server for this pack but that has yet to be finished. However I hope you look forward to that as much as I am.
